description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode, was traveling northeast on 11th Street approaching Folsom Street in San 
Francisco. A passenger car (Vehicle 2) was parallel parked on the right side of the roadway in the same direction as the Zoox vehicle. The 
passenger car pulled out of the parking spot and made a U-turn into the opposite travel lane, and unexpectedly crossed the double-yellow 
centerline and veered into the Zoox vehicle's travel lane. The Zoox vehicle braked in response to the encroaching passenger car however the 
passenger car made contact with the Zoox vehicle's driver's side fender and front and rear doors. The Zoox vehicle operator disengaged from
 autonomy and braked to a stop shortly after. The Zoox vehicle sustained major damage and had to be towed from the scene. The frontal 
airbags deployed on the passenger car and it sustained moderate damage to the front driver's side. The passenger car driver fled the scene 
and did not exchange information. The police were called to the scene and there were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
